explanation: I entered the seeded ERPNext administrator login.
I entered the seeded ERPNext password.
I signed in so ERPNext can redirect back to a fresh new customer form.
I entered the deterministic customer name.
I re-focused the details tab so ERPNext commits the typed customer name before saving.
I saved the new customer so I can verify it from the customer list.
I returned to the customer list so I can verify the saved customer from a second view.
I entered the saved customer name into the customer-list filter.
I applied the filter so the saved customer row is isolated for cross-view verification.
